subject: enron industrial markets - super saturday recruiting

emails.subject: Re: Enron Industrial Markets - Super Saturday Recruiting
emails.subject_base: Enron Industrial Markets - Super Saturday Recruiting
emails.body: Re: Enron Industrial Markets Super Saturday Recruiting BH, If the Super Saturday occurred on a different weekend, I would help you out. However, we have a pretty important family weekend coming up. Cole's 3rd birthday is today. We will be doing a little celebrating with that. Plus, we are putting our house on the market this week and are scheduling appointments to view other houses. Anyway, I hope everything else is going well for you. We need to talk sometime. I will call you in a couple of days. D Enron North America Corp. From: Brenda F Herod 01/15/2001 09:39 AM

emails.subject: Re: Enron Industrial Markets - Super Saturday Recruiting
emails.subject_base: Enron Industrial Markets - Super Saturday Recruiting
emails.body: Re: Enron Industrial Markets Super Saturday Recruiting Thanks so much. Let's talk I'll be back in the office on Thursday. Have fun and good luck with the house hunt and sale!
